programme.title: The Dead And The Deadly
programme.desc: Fatboy is a helper to Grand Uncle who is the town's high priest. They are now found in the ancestral shrine of the Mas working wonders. Fatboy is also being reprimanded by Grand Uncle for being rude to his fiancee, Yuen. The last of the Mas, the rich family in town, is back but Ma Lucho is coming home dead. Accompanying the body is a woman who claims to be Ma's wife and very much pregnant. But Fatboy knows his boyhood friend Ma couldn't be a husband because he was impotent...

programme.title: E1 - The Thyssen-Bornemisza Museum, Madrid, Classical Painting
programme.desc: A journey through time with the private collection accumulated by the Thyssen-Bornemisza family of German industrialists, specialists in steel manufacturing. In pride of place: the great classical French painters including Vouet, Watteau, Robert, Vernet, Gericault, Delacroix...

programme.title: E12 - Chicken With Tarragon And Ratatouille
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Mauricette Jacquet, a hyperactive pensioner, former postman and fine cook. She's here to pass on her tips and experience with a simple, gourmet recipe: tarragon chicken served with ratatouille flavoured with ras el-hanout.

programme.title: E33 - Chevilly - Chamerolles
programme.desc: Near Orleans, the Chevilly castle reveals its elegant silhouette in the natural region of Beauce. Between the Middle Ages and the Renaissance, luxurious baths and captivating fragrances... At the Chamerolles castle, history blends with the scents of the 18th century.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: For the first challenge, the twelve contestants of this fourteenth brigade must draw inspiration from the arrival of spring. On the menu: a lamb dish with all-green sides.

programme.title: E8 - From Guadeloupe To Saint Martin
programme.desc: Welcome to the French West Indies, exploring two overseas territories with diverse natural treasures. In Guadeloupe, discover the breathtaking landscapes of the ''Island of Beautiful Waters.'' Then head to Saint Martin, an island half French, half Dutch...

programme.desc: Quebec's culinary heritage wouldn't be the same without ground meat. To honor this often-misunderstood ingredient, we invite Nathalie Simard, Jean-Sebastien Girard, and chefs Marc Maula and Amine Laabi.

programme.title: E4 - Lalique Crystal/Acapulco Paradiso Paris
programme.desc: Parisian walk around the Place des Vosges. Lalique revives the innovative spirit of Rene Lalique through a collection that enhances light and nature. Learn all about the origins of the marquise ring. The brand Acapulco Paradiso Paris, by Zoe du Puy-Montbrun, creates original outfits for dancers.

programme.title: E1 - Martelange
programme.desc: To kick off the 2025 season, Adrien Joveneau highlights the town of Martelange, located on the Luxembourg border, known for its slate mining past and its wooded landscapes. The musical guest for this stop is the band Suarez, accompanied by Antoine Donneaux.

programme.title: E3 - Unusual Museums
programme.desc: Among the two hundred museums in the city of Paris, some are more confidential than others and belong to brands, associations, or private collectors. Yvan Hallouin explores the most surprising of them.

programme.title: E7 - Terroirs Of Excellence In Franche-Comte, From The Jura Mountains To The Mon
programme.desc: From watchmakers to cooks to jewellers to guides: these enthusiasts protect and celebrate their region from the plateaus of the Jura mountains to the Montbeliard region. Turned towards nature and protection of natural resources, they also seek to promote the know-how of skilled tradesmen passed on from generation to generation.

programme.desc: Head Judge Curtis Stone puts the chefs to the ultimate test when they must keep up with him to perfectly re-create one of his signature dishes. Each chef is filled with joy to create a celebratory feast using whole game birds, which they’ll serve in a Top Chef Junior Dining Room transformed into the Great Hall. Gail Simmons & game meats expert, Tim Love, are the guest judges… and for the first time in Top Chef Junior history, our chefs sit down with the judges’ to share a meal!

programme.title: CNBC Sports - Asian Le Mans Series
programme.desc: Created by the Automobile Club de l'Ouest (ACO), the Asian Le Mans Series symbolises the Spirit of Le Mans, holding the same shared passion for creating world class endurance racing in Asia. The Asian Le Mans Series is growing year on year and is attracting some of the world's most successful endurance racing teams, as well as fostering new and emerging talent from the region.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America's top CEOs, CNBC's Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today's most influential companies.

programme.title: The Tech Download
programme.desc: Hosted by Arjun Kharpal and Steve Kovach, CNBC's “Tech Download” podcast cuts through the noise to unpack the technology stories that matter most. With access to industry leaders and years of experience covering the biggest tech news, Arjun and Steve deliver sharp analysis and compelling narratives on the trends, risks and innovations shaping tech.

programme.desc: CNBC goes on assignment at the biggest events around the world, bringing you interviews and insight from the most influential leaders in business, politics, activism and the arts.

programme.title: E17 - Calypso
programme.desc: At school, Bluey and her friends enjoy various games. Teacher Calypso keeps her charges on track with a wise word and a song... all except the mysterious Pretzel.

programme.title: E3 - Roly's First Day
programme.desc: As Roly makes his usual noise in the Clubhouse, Duggee and the Squirrels reminisce about how completely different Roly was when he first arrived.

programme.title: E5 - Go Jet Academy: Artificial Reef
programme.desc: Xuli finds a shipwreck on a coral reef and learns some glitches don't need to be fixed.

programme.title: E7 - Avenue Of The Baobabs, Madagascar
programme.desc: GrimHQ crashes into the Baobab trees. Can the Go Jetters rescue a baby lemur in time?

programme.title: E8 - Molly's Saint Lucian Jerk Sea Bass
programme.desc: Molly brings the flavours of the Caribbean to her home and cooks a Saint Lucian themed meal for her friends. She makes a feast of jerk fish, spiced potato wedges and an avocado salsa.

programme.title: E4 - Squash
programme.desc: When dad and Uncle Stripe play a game of squash, Bluey and Bingo are in control of their every move, and Bingo proves that big siblings don't always beat little siblings.

programme.title: E2 - Speedy Pea
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Supertato's brand new Tato Car but doesn't realise that the Grape Kids are in the back seat. Supertato has to get the Grape Kids back to safety and save his car.

programme.title: E20 - The Midnight Badge
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: E1 - The Carrot Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E14 - Gills
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy wants to know how his goldfish friend can stay underwater for so long. He goes to OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: E15 - Paperchase
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy has a pair of yummy green socks waiting for him. He eats one, but where is the second? He visits OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: E9 - It's Time To Grow A Flower
programme.desc: JoJo tries to grow a daffodil but is disheartened to learn that it will take a long time to bloom. Cynthia and Gran Gran show JoJo how to take care of it and the best way to measure its growth.

Life Support
programme.desc: An HBO Original Movie, Life Support tells the tale of an HIV-positive woman who learns lessons of love and strength through helping others.

programme.title: E1162
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Playing With Fire
programme.desc: When an elite team of firefighters come to the rescue of three siblings, they quickly realise that no amount of training could prepare them for their most challenging job yet – babysitting.

programme.title: Path To War
programme.desc: President Johnson and his foreign-policy team struggle with the decision to end the Vietnam war in this HBO Original film.

programme.title: Inkheart
programme.desc: What if every time you read aloud, the story came to life?

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: A company's flagship idol is seemingly abandoned(?) by their own agency! Stepping away from life as a popular idol, the new journey begins.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E16

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E6 - 舊愛vs新歡？
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E1 - Mission Black Rhino
programme.desc: It’s a critical time for two black rhinos in Zambia. Four year old female Apson and fourteen year old bull Kango are at the core of a complex relocation mission that’s part of a grand plan to save a species.

programme.title: E2 - Carnivore Rescue
programme.desc: Deep in Kafue National Park, the largest and wildest protected area in Zambia, a team of biologists and vets from the Zambian Carnivore Programme (ZCP) races against time to save and protect Africa’s apex predators.

programme.title: E1 - Jungle Killers
programme.desc: A jaguar stalks the riverbank. A venomous snake is on the move. A Colombian tarantula waits for night fall. Watch as these fierce predators prowl through the jungle and bite into their next great meal.

programme.title: E3 - A Life Among Trees
programme.desc: How many trees can you find in the Amazon? And what’s it like to live up in them? Travel through the canopy and see how more than 1200 species of trees coexist. Plus, follow monkeys and other creatures who call these trees home.

programme.title: E5 - Jungle Juniors
programme.desc: Every year, more than 200,000 monkeys in Peru are trafficked illegally. Almost all are babies. Watch as these little ones learn to survive without their moms and try to make new friends along the way.

programme.title: E1 - Mission Black Rhino
programme.desc: It’s a critical time for two black rhinos in Zambia. Four year old female Apson and fourteen year old bull Kango are at the core of a complex relocation mission that’s part of a grand plan to save a species.

programme.title: E2 - Carnivore Rescue
programme.desc: Deep in Kafue National Park, the largest and wildest protected area in Zambia, a team of biologists and vets from the Zambian Carnivore Programme (ZCP) races against time to save and protect Africa’s apex predators.

programme.title: E1 - Jungle Killers

programme.title: E3 - A Life Among Trees

programme.title: E5 - Jungle Juniors
programme.desc: Every year, more than 200,000 monkeys in Peru are trafficked illegally. Almost all are babies. Watch as these little ones learn to survive without their moms and try to make new friends along the way.

programme.title: E8 - Costa Rica - Shark Defenders
programme.desc: The Pacific coast of Costa Rica is a biodiversity hotspot that hosts nearly 5,000 species of marine life. But here in this undersea jungle, the ocean’s top predator is at risk. Discover how marine defenders are teaming up to save the shark.

programme.title: Turtle Beach
programme.desc: Locals call it the ‘arribada’, or ‘arrival’. The magical days and nights when tens of thousands of sea turtles come ashore in Costa Rica, to lay millions of eggs.

programme.title: E2 - Connections
programme.desc: Follow scientists and Traditional Owners as they map out ecological links, migratory pathways, and interspecies bonds that conserve Ningaloo’s biodiversity. Frolic with whales, float among seaweed islands, and see archaeologists nix a settler myth.

programme.title: E3 - The Next Generation
programme.desc: Channel your inner sci-fi fan and explore the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean’s most peculiar creatures. Learn how bloody battles for mates, gender bending and supersize litters of babies just might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.desc: How many trees can you find in the Amazon? And what’s it like to live up in them? Travel through the canopy and see how more than 1200 species of trees coexist. Plus, follow monkeys and other creatures who call these trees home.

programme.title: E5 - Jungle Juniors
programme.desc: Every year, more than 200,000 monkeys in Peru are trafficked illegally. Almost all are babies. Watch as these little ones learn to survive without their moms and try to make new friends along the way.

programme.title: E3 - The Next Generation
programme.desc: Channel your inner sci-fi fan and explore the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean’s most peculiar creatures. Learn how bloody battles for mates, gender bending and supersize litters of babies just might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: E1 - Mission Black Rhino
programme.desc: It’s a critical time for two black rhinos in Zambia. Four year old female Apson and fourteen year old bull Kango are at the core of a complex relocation mission that’s part of a grand plan to save a species.

programme.title: E2 - Carnivore Rescue
programme.desc: Deep in Kafue National Park, the largest and wildest protected area in Zambia, a team of biologists and vets from the Zambian Carnivore Programme (ZCP) races against time to save and protect Africa’s apex predators.

programme.title: E1 - Jungle Killers
programme.desc: A jaguar stalks the riverbank. A venomous snake is on the move. A Colombian tarantula waits for night fall. Watch as these fierce predators prowl through the jungle and bite into their next great meal.

programme.title: E8 - Costa Rica - Shark Defenders
programme.desc: The Pacific coast of Costa Rica is a biodiversity hotspot that hosts nearly 5,000 species of marine life. But here in this undersea jungle, the ocean’s top predator is at risk. Discover how marine defenders are teaming up to save the shark.

programme.title: Turtle Beach
programme.desc: Locals call it the ‘arribada’, or ‘arrival’. The magical days and nights when tens of thousands of sea turtles come ashore in Costa Rica, to lay millions of eggs.

programme.title: E2 - Connections
programme.desc: Follow scientists and Traditional Owners as they map out ecological links, migratory pathways, and interspecies bonds that conserve Ningaloo’s biodiversity. Frolic with whales, float among seaweed islands, and see archaeologists nix a settler myth.

With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! programme.desc: Masters of Cantonese Cuisine is a documentary on Lingnan (Guangdong) delicacies culture, originally created by Shenzhen Satellite TV. This is a brief history of food belonging to the Greater Bay Area, a history of customs and culture that belongs exclusively to Guangdong. The program focus on the local Guangdong delicacies, and led by a “delicacy searcher”, walking through streets in search of local specialities, visiting masters of Cantonese cuisines, and sharing unique tasting commentaries. In the meantime, the reflection on delicacies would be brought back to live studio, and two observers who are proficient in Cantonese cuisine cultures will have chats on tasting. From a spoon and a drop, it will extend to the taste of life and origin of culture embedded in the delicacies.

programme.title: Reuse at the Fire Station
programme.desc: The Grimwades meet Cheryl, a firefighter in the local fire station. She explains that the fire hoses can be reused in all sorts of things, including belts and furniture. This gives the family an idea to reuse their wellington boots.

programme.title: Eric Makes Paper!
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make a beautiful sheet of recycled paper. He finds out what people used to write on before paper was invented.

programme.title: Super Sensitive Skin
programme.desc: Your body's largest organ is your skin – find out how it works and how to make your own homunculus!

programme.title: Tough Challenges
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are facing tough challenges and unusual tasks. From swimming with critically endangered sharks to performing tricky surgery on a dog's knee, the kids are trying to prove they've got what it takes to care for unwell animals.

programme.title: Eric, The Map, and the Compass
programme.desc: Eric learns how a compass works and makes one using a needle. He discovers that because of the iron at the centre of the Earth and the way the Earth spins, the magnetic field around our planet acts like a giant magnet.

programme.title: International Rivalry
programme.desc: Will captain Emily be fit enough to skate with her team, and what is the surprise in store for Afton? Meanwhile, back in Nottingham, young figure skater Solomon needs to nail his axels if he wants to impress Coach Tamara.

programme.title: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Kloe visits her family in Hungary, where she plans to find inspiration for her upcoming solo gala. Meanwhile, Josh and Ellie compete at a higher level for the first time.

programme.title: Plastic Cups
programme.desc: What could we make with a paper cup? Let's find out.

programme.title: Tin Can
programme.desc: Tin Tin Tin, Hepi and Briko have an unbelievable idea for these tin cans.

programme.title: Day of the Dragon
programme.desc: Ricky orders a takeaway, but will his fortune cookies' predictions come true? After making a dragon bike basket and using a pizza box as a canvas, Gavin arrives with a map to the Great Wall of Bristol to animate a monster of a picture.

programme.title: Thinking out Loud
programme.desc: A bump on the head gives Flippy the power to hear everyone's thoughts, which is fun for a while and results in an unexpected relationship with Naomi. However, he soon realises that always hearing the truth can be uncomfortable.

programme.title: Trip to Canary Islands
programme.desc: Is it possible to communicate over a distance with neither telephone nor internet access? A little trip to the Canary Islands could answer the question. With the help of their penfriend Kiko, our friends will learn to use the landscape to communicate with others.

programme.title: Soapy Sailing
programme.desc: Eric makes a model boat using soap as fuel. The boat moves because the soap breaks the surface tension of the water, causing the water molecules to repel each other and push each other backwards into the boat.

programme.title: Nailed It!
programme.desc: There is a giant nail in the lab as the doctors show what our nails are made of and what happens if you stub your toe, don't eat enough veg, or get a fungal infection. And Raphi and Rebecca are back to show us more about their lives.

programme.title: Mission: Mix Impossible!
programme.desc: Eric learns that a mixture of oil and vinegar will always end up separating because they have different densities. Shaking them will blend them again for a while. He does an experiment mixing different densities and gets some surprising results.

programme.title: Heavy Surgery
programme.desc: The Junior Vets have got one day's experience under their belts. Today a wild boar needs the Junior Vets' help, a tiny dog goes in a massive scanner, and a snotty cow is having heavy surgery.

programme.title: Eric, The Map, and the Compass
programme.desc: Eric learns how a compass works and makes one using a needle. He discovers that because of the iron at the centre of the Earth and the way the Earth spins, the magnetic field around our planet acts like a giant magnet.

programme.title: Eye Gunk
programme.desc: In this episode, the doctors put eye boogers under the microscope and show you how to make edible eye gunk!

programme.desc: Eric learns how a compass works and makes one using a needle. He discovers that because of the iron at the centre of the Earth and the way the Earth spins, the magnetic field around our planet acts like a giant magnet.

programme.desc: In 2024, Florida is pounded by two huge back-to-back deadly hurricanes. Helene and Milton wreak havoc with storm surges and dozens of tornadoes.

programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates the sudden disappearance of notorious Teamster president Jimmy Hoffa. New technology aids in the search for the Holy Grail.

programme.title: E2 - Tiny Heroes, Giant-Sized Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle may be small, but they're tiny heroes on giant-sized adventures! When a hamster gets stuck in a colorful cardboard maze, a rescue mission begins! Mila & Morphle get shrunk to hamster size & go into the maze to find their little furry pal. Then, when a whale gets stranded on the beach, the friends shrink it to get it back to the ocean. But when Winston races away with the tiny whale, the chase is on!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E1 - Learn & Dance with JJ's Animal Pals!
programme.desc: It's a learning dance party with JJ's animal pals! First, learn all about vowels with the fun & silly song 'Apples & Bananas.' Then, get ready to count as you dance with dinosaurs & countdown from five to one. The learning continues as you guess what sounds different animals make & bounce like rabbits, frogs & kangaroos on a trampoline! Plus, you can even learn to sing 'Itsy Bitsy Spider' entirely in Spanish with Nina!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E2 - A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming & magical night with Twinkle the star! When Bao Bao struggles to sleep, Twinkle arrives & transforms into a hot air balloon to lift her cot into the night sky so she can see the moon. Then, she helps Max, Muffin & Bao Bao get ready for bed by transforming into a cuddly teddy bear to give them all warm goodnight hugs. From creating a magical rainbow over the bath to turning into a kite for a gentle ride, Twinkle always makes bedtime magical.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E10 - Siblings Month: Family Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Celebrate Siblings Month with family fun & learning! First, JJ finds his family members all around the house, discovering what each of them does, from playing guitar to painting. Then, join the siblings as they bake a tasty cake together for a special treat! The learning continues as YoYo teaches JJ to love vegetables, the kids race balloon cars & they learn the days of the week through playful activities. It's a month full of family, fun & learning!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E2 - A Calming Night with Twinkle!

programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a naked man makes a scene on a Miami Beach; a drunk driver finds a strange and dangerous place to relieve himself; and more!

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 《愛很美味》講述了三位個性迥異、特色鮮明的都市麗人，在經歷了一系列創業的艱辛，職場的壓迫，和感情的波折後，對生活、事業和愛情都有了重新的認識。

programme.title: E3 - Always Bet on Dot
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.desc: A family of black bears are studied in the forested hills of Oklahoma.

programme.title: E1 - Terry's Criminal Minds
programme.desc: A murderer tries to kill his final victim as the car they are in slowly sinks to the bottom of a lake. The only way to save the victim is to rescue her as the car continues to sink. programme.title: E1 - Terry's Criminal Minds

programme.title: E59 - The Return/The Nemesis/The Crew/The Others/The Signature
programme.desc: Dad has to make the kids on time for their first day back at school. But he's overslept and now he can't find Gumball, Darwin or Anais anywhere. He sets about retracing his steps from the day before, to work out where they might be. When he finally figures out where they are, it's a race against time to rescue them and prove to himself - and Mum - that he's not a bad father.

programme.title: Suzume
programme.desc: Suzume, a 17-year-old girl who lives in a quiet town in Kyushu, meets Souta, a young man looking for a door. Following Souta, Suzume finds an old door in the mountains and reaches out her hands towards the door as if pulled by something. This opened door will bring disaster; thus, Souta must travel around to lock the door to avoid disaster. But then, a mysterious kitten turns Souta into a broken wooden chair. To catch the kitten, Suzume and Souta follow it and travel from Kyushu to Tokyo. “Doors of disaster” begin to appear across Japan simultaneously, and Suzume needs to close and lock the doors one by one to stop the disasters. Unexpectedly, a forgotten truth is waiting for her.

programme.title: Adventure of The King
programme.desc: Emperor Zhengde of the Ming Dynasty is young and playful, privately escapes from Palace to avoid the appointed marriage. He loses his memory by accident and luckily comes across Ms. Li to take care him. Prince Ningxia takes this opportunity to rebel the kingdom and catch the emperor to execute him immediately at the execution ground. At a critical time, three entourages rescue the Emperor and the prince Ningxia is arrested. However, Ms Li has refused to get marriage with the emperor due to his cheating on her love feelings.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！
